rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Fam. Code §262.201 governs full adversary hearings in child protection suits. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matters with no overlap.
quote: Sec. 262.201. FULL ADVERSARY HEARING; FINDINGS OF THE COURT.
_note: No conflict. The proposed tax exemption change has no bearing on child protection adversary hearing procedures.
